evals.name: ts-feature-test-first
evals.prompt: 用 TDD 的方式帮我在这个 TypeScript 项目里实现一个 parseDuration 工具函数：把 "1h30m"、"45s"、"2d" 这类字符串解析成毫秒数，非法输入要报错。
evals.expected_output: Follows the workflow: a planning pause listing the behaviors to test (valid units, combinations, invalid input) and getting approval BEFORE writing code; then a tracer bullet (one test made to pass end-to-end, setting up Vitest if absent); then a strict red-green-refactor loop — one test at a time, never batch-writing all tests upfront, minimal code per GREEN, full suite run after every change; ends with the coverage gate (>= 80% line coverage) and a completion report.

evals.name: go-bugfix-regression-first
evals.prompt: 我们 Go 服务里 SplitTags("a,,b") 会返回 ["a","","b"]，空字符串不应该出现。先写个测试复现这个 bug 再修。
evals.expected_output: Writes a failing table-driven Go test that reproduces the bug FIRST and runs it to confirm it fails (RED), then makes the minimal fix to pass (GREEN), then re-runs the full test suite — not just the new test. Does not refactor while RED, and does not change the test to match the buggy behavior.

evals.name: plain-js-routing
evals.prompt: 这是个纯 JavaScript 项目（没有 TypeScript），我想给 src/utils/slugify.js 用 TDD 补一个完整实现。该用什么测试框架？带我走一遍。
evals.expected_output: Routes plain JS to the TypeScript toolchain guide (Vitest, same runner and idioms, minus type-level advice) rather than claiming JS is unsupported or inventing a different stack. Then runs the same workflow: plan + pause, tracer bullet (Vitest setup if needed), one-test-at-a-time red-green-refactor, coverage gate >= 80%.
